data.systemPurpose: OpenSpec is a data pipeline that harvests podcast episodes from a NotebookLM API, converts them to MP3 format, and manages a podcast feed. It automates the process of fetching, processing, and maintaining podcast episodes, ensuring a seamless user experience.
data.architectureStyle: Monolithic architecture: The system is a single, unified unit with all components tightly coupled. This pattern was chosen for simplicity and ease of deployment, given the relatively small scale of the project.
data.dataFlow: HTTP request → route handler → service → entity operations → persistence; async processing of artifacts to MP3 via HarvesterService
data.securityModel: No explicit authentication/authorization mechanism is evident from the provided analysis. This is a potential area for improvement.
keyDecisions: Monolithic architecture chosen for simplicity and ease of deployment
HarvesterService centralizes the business logic for managing podcast episodes
Entities represent the data model and are used throughout the system
